title: Göteborg Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Göteborg with a Z-Score of -3.71. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Göteborg are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The low temperatures are expected to persist, with a high heating degree days (HDD) value of 14.0 GG. 
 The humidita is relatively high at 64%, with a gentle wind of 1.8 km/h.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
